title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Donate to the Philippine National Police Los Baños Municipal Station the Following Information Technology and Communications Equipment Purchased by the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Amounting to One Hundred Thirty Nine Thousand Nine Hundred Sixty Pesos (P 139,960.00) and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR: BENEDICTO S. ALBORIDA, 8/08/2022)
